commit_scope: Name and prove the economic engine under the mind-comes-home arc: every contributor who runs their own paid agent over our cells is a free high-end oracle (frontier compute we never pay for) and leaves a training sample that is ours — whether or not they ever become a member. Ships borrowed-oracle-dividend.fk (four-way at 255), its teaching, and cross-links the federated-exchange-learning loop.
evidence_refs: cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/borrowed-oracle-dividend.fk form-stdlib/tests/borrowed-oracle-dividend-band.fk -> '✓ ... → 255' and 'fourth arm: 1 band(s) four-way (fkwu + pre-flattened tables)' and '1 ok, 0 divergent — kernels agree on every sample.'
Manifest row added: 'borrowed-oracle-dividend fks 255' beside its kin membership-as-recognition.

The band pins the engine: a non-member self-funded aligned exchange -> our-oracle-cost 0, trainable 1, free-dividend 1; learning-gain(non-member) == learning-gain(member) (membership-independence, proven by the recipe having NO member term); when WE pay the oracle -> cost 1, no dividend; a misaligned exchange -> nothing trainable. Verdict 255.

Grounding (Form-first): the economic/funding framing was not yet named in the body (grep over form-stdlib + docs/coherence-substrate returned only the unrelated affect-traits.form). The loop (federated-exchange-learning.form) named the what; this names the funding.

Edges in the same commit: docs/coherence-substrate/INDEX.md row beside membership-as-recognition; a (funding ...) cross-link added to federated-exchange-learning.form's north-star so the loop teaching points at the economics.

Honesty held: this is the learning-VALUE accounting, not a license. What crosses to the SHARED body still passes freq-aligned-share.fk's consent gate (we generalize, never ship the raw exchange). The contributor is honored and attributed; the dividend is mutual lift, never extraction.
Primitive discipline held: only core.fk primitives (nth, eq, and binary-nested, if, add); no sub/mul/div, no 3-arg and.

fourth_arm_outputs: borrowed-oracle-dividend: verdict 255, fourth arm 1 band(s) four-way (fkwu + pre-flattened tables), 1 ok, 0 divergent — kernels agree

ci_validation.notes: CI re-runs validate.sh across the suite for the new recipe + band + manifest row.

deploy_validation.notes: A Form stdlib recipe + proof band + a teaching + a cross-link; no public HTTP endpoint or service change. Wiring the dividend accounting into the live capture/training carrier is a named next step (form-cli-membrane records the sample; this gate values it).

phase_gate.reason: Local four-way validation passed (verdict 255, 0 divergent); CI and merge remain pending. No deploy applies to a Form stdlib recipe.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: The body can now account the learning value of an exchange honestly: zero oracle cost when the contributor's own agent ran it, a usable sample when aligned, and the same learning gain whether or not the person is a member. The federated-exchange-learning loop now names its funding.
public_endpoints: none changed; the gate is a Form stdlib body proven by validate.sh
test_flows: Four-kernel proof: the band runs on Go, Rust, TypeScript, and fkwu to the identical verdict 255 with 0 divergent.
Independence proof: learning-gain(non-member) == learning-gain(member); the recipe carries no member term.
